title: cynanchum ansamalense
intro: Cynanchum ansamalense, a plant species in the Apocynaceae family, is also known as Asle or Ansamal. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Cynanchum ansamalense include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and reduce stress levels. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, and can also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
